content: Self-Refine's single-LLM iterative feedback loop can be repurposed to anchor the multiple inconsistent perspectives used in LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a hybrid framework that preserves Self-Refine's advantage of no extra training while fixing the common issue of unstructured perspective alignment in multi-perspective reflection. This hybrid approach allows an LLM to resolve contradictions between its different problem-solving perspectives through iterative self-feedback, rather than requiring external aggregation or additional models.
